tasks.description: CR-008 follow-up: Unify 4 remaining preview locations (workplace.js, folder-browser-modal.js, compose-idea-modal.js, link-preview-manager.js) to use shared FilePreviewRenderer. Added /api/file/raw endpoint with DOCX/MSG conversion. All 6 preview locations now unified. DAO mode.

CR-008 for FEATURE-049-F: Unify file preview across KB browse, workflow deliverables, and all other preview locations — shared preview component for consistency. Source: UIUX Feedback Feedback-20260318-213942. DAO mode.
Refine FEATURE-049-F specification for CR-008: Detail FilePreviewRenderer shared component ACs, UI/UX requirements, edge cases, technical considerations. DAO mode.
Design CR-008 for FEATURE-049-F: FilePreviewRenderer shared component in core/file-preview-renderer.js. Configurable endpoint, blob lifecycle, KB browse + deliverable viewer integration. DAO mode.
Implement CR-008 for FEATURE-049-F: FilePreviewRenderer in core/file-preview-renderer.js (~180 LOC), refactor KB browse modal + deliverable viewer to delegate. 16 ACs. DAO mode.
Execute acceptance tests for CR-008 FEATURE-049-F: Validate 16 ACs (18a–18p) for FilePreviewRenderer. Unit tests via Vitest, UI tests via Chrome DevTools MCP. DAO mode.
Close CR-008 FEATURE-049-F: Verify ACs, code-to-docs review, commit changes to main. Git strategy: main-branch-only. DAO mode.
Fix stale `kb-config.json` references in docstrings, docs, specs, and skill files — should be `knowledgebase-config.json`. 82 replacements across 17 files. DAO mode.
CR-007 for FEATURE-049-F: Normal Upload zone — add click-to-browse native file selection and upload success indication. Source: UIUX Feedback Feedback-20260318-205614. DAO mode.

Refine FEATURE-049-F specification for CR-007: Add FRs (FR-049-F.21, FR-049-F.22), UI/UX requirements, edge cases, and technical considerations for Normal Upload click-to-browse and success indication. DAO mode.
Design CR-007 changes for FEATURE-049-F: _triggerNormalFileInput(), _uploadFilesWithFeedback(), _showUploadFeedback() in kb-browse-modal.js. Added Step 12 to TD v1.4. DAO mode.

Implement CR-007 for FEATURE-049-F in kb-browse-modal.js: replaced trigger-upload handler with _triggerNormalFileInput(), added _uploadFilesWithFeedback() and _showUploadFeedback(), updated _handleNormalDrop(). All 808 tests pass. DAO mode.
Make refine_idea optional in workflow; compose_idea can suggest requirement_gathering directly. Source: user request. DAO mode.
Workflow mode instructions hardcode 'en' language — should respect project language config (zh etc). Source: Feedback-20260318-173426 #1. DAO mode.
Claude Code CLI adapter uses wrong `-p` flag in command. Should be `claude "prompt"` not `claude -p "prompt"`. Source: Feedback-20260318-173426 #2. DAO mode.
Close CR-006 full-width layout for FEATURE-049-F: verify ACs, commit changes. DAO mode.
Validate CR-006 full-width layout ACs for FEATURE-049-F: 6/6 CSS assertion tests pass, live browser verification confirms no max-width on .kb-article-main. DAO mode.
Implement CR-006 for FEATURE-049-F: Remove max-width: 780px from .kb-article-main in kb-browse-modal.css + 6 frontend tests. DAO mode.
Design CR-006 full-width article layout delta for FEATURE-049-F: remove max-width constraint, add padding, verify sidebar compatibility. DAO mode.
Refine FEATURE-049-F specification for CR-006: Add ACs for full-width article content area, clarify AC-049-F-16b image scaling wording. DAO mode.

CR-006 for FEATURE-049-F: Widen article content/image rendering area to span full available width with margins, eliminating wasted white space. Source: UIUX Feedback Feedback-20260318-102218. DAO mode.
Close CR-005 folder support for FEATURE-049-F: verify ACs, code-to-docs review, refactoring analysis, push to main. DAO mode.
Validate CR-005 folder support ACs for FEATURE-049-F: backend tree/status/cascade tests, frontend tree rendering/toggle/filter/action tests, structured review of API response schema. DAO mode.

Implement CR-005 folder support for FEATURE-049-F: backend tree builder, derived status, deep pending count, folder cascade; frontend tree rendering with expand/collapse, filter, folder actions. Fullstack (Python/Flask + JS). DAO mode.
Design CR-005 folder support delta for FEATURE-049-F: tree data model, derived status algorithm, folder actions, pre-loaded API response, folder tree UI rendering. DAO mode.
Refine FEATURE-049-F specification for CR-005 (folder support in intake). Update ACs, UI/UX requirements, functional requirements for folder tree display and count logic. DAO mode.
CR for KB intake: fix file count logic for uploaded folders (shows 0) and add folder tree display with expand/collapse in intake file list view. Source: UIUX Feedback Feedback-20260318-083710
KB article preview renders image files (.jpg, .png, etc.) inline. Added /api/kb/files/{path}/raw route + frontend image type detection + CSS. 4 Python + 6 JS tests.
Replace `watchdog` with `watchfiles` in backend file watching while preserving `FileWatcher` behavior and public lifecycle methods. DAO mode.
tasks.next_task: Replaced watcher engine with `watchfiles`, preserved event semantics via normalization, updated dependency metadata/docs, and validated with watcher-focused pytest. Unrelated failures remain in `test_navigation.py::test_get_structure_returns_five_sections` and broader `npm test`.

tasks.description: Organize pending `ideation-user-manual` intake files: analyze content, assign metadata, generate index entries, and move files into a dedicated KB folder. DAO mode.
tasks.next_task: Filed all 25 intake files into `ideation-user-manual/`, wrote per-file metadata plus a root folder entry, and cleared `.intake/` pending items.
